action_text: Click the Show/Hide filter icon for the reports list
rationale: Opening the list filter builder lets me filter by Title (e.g., contains "assigned to" or "incidents by agent") to quickly locate the needed report on this page.

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort the list
rationale: Sorting by Title may bring a report like "Incidents by agent" or "Incidents by assigned to" into a predictable position, making it easier to find.

action_text: Click the Table column header to sort by table
rationale: Sorting by Table will group all Incident reports together, narrowing the list to likely candidates related to incidents and agents.
If more reports exist below the fold, scrolling will reveal additional items that may match the target title.

action_text: Click the Reports page header to dismiss the popover and refocus the list
rationale: The global search context popover may be obstructing controls; clicking the Reports header should dismiss it and refocus the page for list interactions.
